research_question: Did city digital-government platform rollout coincide with changes in firm green patenting?
model_scope: firm-year units nested in rollout cities during policy adoption window with platform rollout as exposure
candidate_inquiry: target comparison is effect of city digital-government platform exposure on firm green patent outcome during rollout years
possible_data_strategy: use city rollout source linked to firm-year patent data and audit missing firm-city linkage
possible_answer_strategy: create feasibility table and rollout timing figure before any estimator or model
materials_available: city rollout list; firm patent panel; firm-city linkage
materials_gap: exogeneity argument and untreated comparison status
first_action: inspect rollout years city linkage and firm-year coverage
expected_first_output: feasibility table with rollout distribution missing linkage and comparison-unit status
failure_signal: no rollout variation or high missing city linkage
stop_reason: stop before estimation because treatment timing and comparison status are not verified
researcher_decision_needed: decide whether a causal route is substantively credible

research_question: What mechanisms do policy documents claim for digital-government effects on firm innovation?
phenomenon: policy mechanism claims in government documents
model_scope: policy-document corpus scoped to digital-government documents and stated firm innovation mechanisms
candidate_inquiry: target classification is mechanism categories in policy document sentences about firms and innovation
possible_data_strategy: use public policy document sources sampled by issuing body year and document type with extraction confidence flags
possible_answer_strategy: code mechanism sentences into a human-reviewable extraction table and source matrix
materials_available: policy report notes; public notice links
materials_gap: complete document corpus and sampling rule
first_action: create extraction schema and sample 20 documents for mechanism sentences
expected_first_output: mechanism extraction schema plus human-review sample
failure_signal: documents unavailable or no mechanism language found
stop_reason: stop before synthesis because corpus coverage is incomplete
researcher_decision_needed: decide which document types count as policy evidence

research_question: How does existing research measure digital government when studying firm outcomes?
model_scope: published-paper corpus scoped to digital-government measures and firm outcome studies
candidate_inquiry: target synthesis question is how studies define and measure digital government for firm outcomes
possible_data_strategy: use seed-paper sources DOI pages and snowballing targets with source-status screening
possible_answer_strategy: build candidate literature discovery table and synthesis-eligibility matrix
materials_gap: verified source list and snowballing targets
first_action: build candidate literature discovery ledger from seed papers
expected_first_output: candidate source ledger with relevance axes and next verification actions
failure_signal: seed papers are secondary summaries or inaccessible
stop_reason: stop before literature synthesis because source verification must happen first
researcher_decision_needed: decide whether measurement or causal identification is the main contribution
